body_txt: If the character is not introduced in this way, it'll often come in the form of a flashback or other form of reveal. It's typical for her to be on extremes of the gender expression scale — going from very butch and androgynous to a Girly Girl . Values Dissonance can factor into this, as in some cultures, femininity is equated with maturity for girls, and girls who remain tomboyish may be thought of as childish. A common variation, especially in comedies, is Old Friend, New Gender . Sub-trope of "All Grown Up" Remark and related to Girliness Upgrade . The inversion is Tomboyness Upgrade . Compare Former Teen Rebel and Tomboy Angst . Not related to Used to Be a Sweet Kid , which is more about morality than interest.
